title: Zhylon CombatLock
description: Modern, Lightweight PvP Combat Plugin for Minecraft Paper Servers
body:
# Zhylon CombatLock
### Modern, Lightweight PvP Combat Plugin for Minecraft Paper Servers

**Zhylon CombatLock** is a powerful and efficient PvP combat system designed specifically for Minecraft Paper servers. Instead of merely tracking combat events, it actively locks players into combat to prevent unfair escapes, restrict certain actions, and ensure a fair and challenging PvP experience. Whether you’re running a hardcore PvP server or simply want to stop combat dodging, **Zhylon CombatLock** delivers with style, flexibility, and performance.

### ✅ Key Features:
- ⚔️ Automatically locks players into combat when taking real PvP damage
- ⏳ Displays an individual, visible combat timer in the action bar
- 🛑 Blocks specific commands while players are locked in combat
- 💀 Instantly punishes players who disconnect during combat by causing death and inventory drop
- ⚙️ Clean, easy-to-use configuration file with full control over timing and settings
- 🔌 Minimal external dependencies — only requires **ZhylonCore**, the backbone of all Zhylon plugins

*📦 Requires [ZhylonCore](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/zhylon-core.126889/) to run.*


### 🛠️ Plugin Commands & Permissions:
- /combatlock — Toggle combat lock bypass (Permission: combatlock.toggle-bypass)
- /combatlock-check [player] — Check if a player is in combat lock (combatlock.check)
- /combatlock-reload — Reload plugin configuration (combatlock.reload)
- /combatlock-timeout <seconds> — Set combat lock timeout (combatlock.timeout)
- /combatlock-toggle — Enable or disable combat lock globally (combatlock.toggle)

Permissions are defaulted to server operators (op) for control.


### ⚙️ Configuration Highlights:
- enabled: Enable or disable the plugin globally (default: true)
- combatlock-enabled: Enable or disable the combat lock feature (default: true)
- combatlock-timeout: Duration in seconds before combat lock expires (default: 10)
- combatlock-bypass-enabled: Allow bypassing combat lock (default: false)

Full configuration allows you to tailor combat behavior exactly to your server’s PvP rules.


### 🛠️ Setup Instructions:
1. Download ZhylonCombatLock.jar and ZhylonCore.jar
2. Place both files into your server’s /plugins/ folder
3. Restart or reload your server
4. Customize the config.yml inside /plugins/ZhylonCombatLock/ to fit your server’s rules
5. Enjoy a fair and balanced PvP combat system right out of the box!
